Metadata.title: Web C&B — Your old website. Brand new again.
Metadata.description: Web C&B is a Swedish web agency that rebuilds tired websites into modern, fast sites — fixed price, delivered in 5 days. No subscriptions, you own the site.
Metadata.ogTitle: Web C&B — Your old website. Brand new again.
Metadata.ogDescription: Swedish web agency. Modern, fast site in 5 days — fixed price. No subscriptions.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Modern, fast site in 5 days — fixed price.

Header.ctaFull: Get a demo for 199 SEK incl. VAT

Hero.subtitle: Paste your current web address — within 48 hours we deliver a personal demo. You fine-tune it with us, add your photos, and we plan the rest together.

Pricing.description: Web C&B is a Swedish web agency that turns tired, outdated websites into modern, fast and conversion-focused sites — using AI and Swedish design craft. You paste your current web address, we deliver a brand new version in days. All for a fixed price, no subscriptions or commitments.
Pricing.footer: All prices are one-time fees including VAT. Beyond the fixed price, only hosting (~99 SEK/month) and domain (~150 SEK/year) apply — we help you set them up. Returning customers get up to 30% off next time.

start.name: Start
start.blurb: Perfect for small businesses, freelancers, and solo entrepreneurs who need a polished digital presence.
start.feature3: Contact form connected to your email
start.feature5: We help you set up hosting

klassisk.name: Classic
klassisk.blurb: For restaurants, salons, shops and service businesses who want a complete site.
klassisk.feature2: Up to 5 pages (menu, about, services, etc.)

premium.name: Premium
premium.blurb: For growing businesses who want a fully tailored site with more functionality.

Gallery.title: 3 example websites for 3 different industries.
Gallery.description: Click a case to preview — the site opens in a live preview where you can switch between desktop and phone view.
Gallery.languageNoteTitle: The demos below are in Swedish — but your site can be in any language
Gallery.languageNoteBody: We build in Swedish, English or other languages as needed. Just let us know when we start the project which language (or languages) you want.

Booking.title: Want a personal walkthrough?
Booking.description: Email us and we'll set up a quick call — we'll go through how it works, answer questions, and show examples. No obligations.
Booking.benefit1Body: Short and concrete. We get to the point.
Booking.benefit3Body: Weekdays 9 AM–6 PM, evenings on request.
Booking.contactNote: Just write when works for you — we'll get back with available times.

q1.question: How fast can you deliver?
q1.answer: We deliver according to the package you choose: Start in 5 days, Classic in 10 days, and Premium in 15 days. The demo is delivered within 24–48 hours after you paste your current web address.

q2.question: What happens after the site is delivered?
q2.answer: You own the site — there's no lock-in. We help you set up domain and hosting in your own name. If you need updates later, you can return to us or handle it yourself.

q3.question: What's included in the 199 SEK demo?
q3.answer: You get a working, designed version of your new website — built specifically for you. No template. The amount is deducted if you choose to continue with one of the packages.

q4.question: Are there any ongoing costs?
q4.answer: Only hosting (~99 SEK/month) and domain (~150 SEK/year), which you pay directly to the provider — not us. No subscriptions or monthly fees from Web C&B.

q5.question: Can I move my existing domain here?
q5.answer: Yes. We help you point your DNS so your existing address works with the new site. Downtime is normally under an hour and we schedule it when it disrupts least.

q6.question: What happens to my Stripe / payments / email?
q6.answer: All of that is decoupled from the site and isn't affected. Your Stripe account, your email addresses and your integrations keep working — we just connect them to the new site.

HowItWorks.title: From tired link to new website — in 5 days.
HowItWorks.step1Body: Paste the address of your existing site. Nothing else needed.
HowItWorks.step2Title: We build a demo for 199 SEK
HowItWorks.step2Body: Within 24–48 hours you'll see a brand new version — designed just for you. 199 SEK incl. VAT.
HowItWorks.step3Body: We fine-tune together until it feels just right. No back-and-forth dragging on.
HowItWorks.step4Body: We set up domain, hosting and everything technical. You get a site that's ready to roll.

WhyUs.reason1Title: Fixed price from 4,900 SEK incl. VAT
WhyUs.reason1Body: No consultancy fees, no surprises. You know exactly what you're paying before we start.
WhyUs.reason2Body: Thanks to AI-powered design we work 10x faster than traditional agencies. Without compromising quality.
WhyUs.reason3Body: You own your website. No monthly fees, no commitments, no lock-in.

DomainHosting.label: What is hosting & domain?
DomainHosting.domainDescription: The address people type to find your site — e.g. yourcompany.com. You rent it per year (~150 SEK/year) and own the rights to the name as long as you renew.
DomainHosting.hostingDescription: The server where the website lives, making it available 24/7. Like rent for a shop — but online. Around 99 SEK/month.
DomainHosting.processTitle: How to set it up — we help all the way
DomainHosting.step1: We recommend a provider (e.g. Loopia, One.com or Google) based on your needs.
DomainHosting.step2: You register an account and buy domain + hosting in your own name — so you own everything.
DomainHosting.step3: You share the login with us temporarily, or invite us as a technical contact.
DomainHosting.step4: We point the domain, upload the site, and set up SSL (https) — done in under a day.

Calculator.title: Calculate your price.
Calculator.description: Adjust the choices — price updates instantly. All fixed price incl. VAT.
Calculator.priceNote: One-time fee incl. VAT · Final price confirmed in the quote

Quote.label: What does the name mean?
Quote.quote: Web C&B stands for Changer & Builder — we change what exists and build what should exist.

Footer.tagline: Swedish web agency that changes what exists and builds what should exist.
Footer.contactHours: Reply within 48 hours. Weekdays 9 AM–6 PM.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Web C&B AB · All rights reserved

CookieBanner.title: We use cookies
CookieBanner.description: Necessary cookies are always used. We'd also like to measure how the site is used so we can improve it.

DemoViewer.keyboardInstruction: Press <kbd>Esc</kbd> to close · scroll inside the frame to explore the page

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.heading: Page not found.
NotFound.description: The page you were looking for isn't here — it was either moved, removed, or you typed the wrong address.
NotFound.footerNote: If you clicked a link on our site — email web.candb@gmail.com and we'll fix it.

Success.title: Thanks — we'll be in touch!
Success.heading: Thanks — we'll be in touch!
Success.descriptionSuffix: is registered and the payment is complete.
Success.receiptPrefix: A receipt has been sent to
Success.footerNote: Questions? Email web.candb@gmail.com — we reply within 48 hours.
Success.stepsDemo1: We'll get in touch within an hour to confirm your order.
Success.stepsDemo2: Within 48 hours we deliver a first version of the demo.
Success.stepsDemo3: You'll get an email with a link where you can see the demo and give feedback.
Success.stepsDemo4: No purchase required — if the demo doesn't hit the mark, that's OK.
Success.stepsStart1: We'll email you within 24 hours to start the project.
Success.stepsStart2: You'll get a short interview (15 min) where we go through content & feel.
Success.stepsStart3: We deliver a first version within 5 working days.
Success.stepsStart4: You approve — we go live + help with domain/hosting.
Success.stepsKlassisk1: We'll email you within 24 hours to start the project.
Success.stepsKlassisk2: You'll get an interview (30 min) where we go through all 5 pages.
Success.stepsKlassisk3: We deliver the first version within 10 working days.
Success.stepsKlassisk4: 1 round of design adjustments included before we go live.
Success.stepsPremium1: We'll email you within 24 hours to start the project.
Success.stepsPremium2: We schedule a strategy meeting to tailor the design.
Success.stepsPremium3: We deliver the first version within 15 working days.
Success.stepsPremium4: 2 rounds of design adjustments + analytics setup included.

Cancelled.title: Order cancelled
Cancelled.heading: No problem.
Cancelled.description: No payment was made. You're always welcome back when you're ready — or email us if you have questions about packages, process, or pricing.
Cancelled.option1Description: Back to pricing and what's included
Cancelled.option2Description: Reply within 48 hours — we help you choose right
